title: American Beef Sandwich
description: A classic American-style sandwich featuring a beef patty, topped with cheese, lettuce, and tomato, all on a toasted bun.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Form the ground beef into 4 patties.
3. Season the beef patties with salt and pepper.
4. Grill the beef patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
5. Toast the buns on the grill or in a toaster.
6. Assemble the sandwiches by spreading mayonnaise or ketchup on the bottom bun, followed by a beef patty, a slice of cheese, a lettuce leaf, and a tomato slice.
